; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; Settings-page injection modelled on rmitchellscott's rm-stylus-remapper (GPL-3.0-only)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-06-23
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[17298303916558156758]]
    TRAVERSE [[254504370080162629]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeLeft
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-left"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(-1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-left")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeRight
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-right"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-right")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeUp
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-up"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, -1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-up")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThreeDown
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-three-down"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 3
                ~&5336243603164651436&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("three-down")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFourLeft
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-four-left"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(-1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("four-left")
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikFourRight
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-four-right"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(1, 0)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.regGestikApply("four-right")
            }

            property ~&197102514&~ gestikLassoPrevTool: -1
            ~&8520322697674622449&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikSelectLassoTap
                ~&2593665694115486297&~: ~&254549375155946341&~.~&8672331594786402181&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&233739427250348&~: {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ === ~&"254547531013851119&~) {
                        ~&233745975898428&~.gestikExitLasso(gestikLassoPrevTool);
                        gestikLassoPrevTool = -1;
                    } ~&6503784146&~ {
                        gestikLassoPrevTool = ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~;
                        ~&233745975898428&~.~&3352491319205423503&~();
                    }
                }
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThicknessIncrease
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-thickness-increase"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, -1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) && ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ != 11 && ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ != 8 && ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ < 3.0) {
                        ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ + 0.5
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ > 3.0) {
                            ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = 3.0
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikThicknessDecrease
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-thickness-decrease"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 4
                ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&13186392338616216743&~(~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~) && ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ != 11 && ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ != 8 && ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ > 1.0) {
                        ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ - 0.5
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ < 1.0) {
                            ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = 1.0
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikPageOverview
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-page-overview"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, -1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 5
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.~&6650786433440202278&~()
            }
            ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikToc
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "gestik-toc"
                ~&233726547792244&~: !~&254549375155946341&~.~&16735792760298061570&~
                ~&7712927726759444&~: 2 * ~&254549375155946341&~.~&496707965879903317&~
                ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 1)
                ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&254549375155946341&~.~&7082729686082&~)
                ~&233727659172727&~: 5
                ~&495358363329399331&~: ~&233745975898428&~.tocShowView()
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11313888899523275277]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            function regGestikDefaults() {
                ~&7083121450889&~ { "version": 1, ~&"7713050416939675&~: {
                    "three-left":  { ~&"6504326343&~: 17, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                    "three-right": { ~&"6504326343&~: 15, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 2.5 },
                    "three-up":    { ~&"6504326343&~: 21, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 },
                    "three-down":  { ~&"6504326343&~: 14, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                    "four-left":   { ~&"6504326343&~: 18, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"7083395101253&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.0 },
                    "four-right":  { ~&"6504326343&~: 23, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"6503861980&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 }
                } };
            }
            function regGestikColorOther(~&6504095402&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = { ~&"214621299494&~: 0, ~&"6503861980&~: 1, ~&"214646069354&~: 2, "blue": 6, ~&"197098276&~: 7, "green": 10, ~&"7083395101253&~: 13, "cyan": 11, "magenta": 12 };
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180982&~[~&6504095402&~];
            }
            function regGestikColorHighlighter(~&6504095402&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = { ~&"7083395101253&~: 4294962549, "blue": 4290702078, "orange": 4294951820, "pink": 4294090495, "green": 4289527685, ~&"6503861980&~: 4291282886 };
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180982&~[~&6504095402&~];
            }
            function regGestikColorShader(~&6504095402&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = { ~&"6503861980&~: 1075912220, "orange": 1946071552, "magenta": 2160099282, "blue": 1295010528, ~&"197098276&~: 1724002610, "green": 2157042289, ~&"7083395101253&~: 1945823001, "cyan": 1718932200 };
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180982&~[~&6504095402&~];
            }
            function regGestikApplyEntry(~&180974&~) {
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&180974&~ || ~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~ === 0) {
                    ~&7083121450889&~;
                }
                ~&5972376&~ ([12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 21, 23].~&233731717342038&~(~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~) === -1) {
                    ~&7083121450889&~;
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&7842069035455457876&~.~&8399230650759060099&~ === ~&"254547531013851119&~) {
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&254547531013823564&~(~&"233740920352621&~);
                }
                ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ = ~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = ~&180974&~.~&254549061334391125&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ < 1.0) { ~&180989&~ = 1.0; }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ > 3.0) { ~&180989&~ = 3.0; }
                ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254549061334391125&~ = ~&180989&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~ && ~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~ !== "keep") {
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~ === 18) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ch = regGestikColorHighlighter(~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (ch !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ = ch; }
                    } ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~ === 23) {
                        ~&197102514&~ cs = regGestikColorShader(~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (cs !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&254525455067777027&~ = cs; }
                    } ~&6503784146&~ {
                        ~&197102514&~ co = regGestikColorOther(~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (co !== ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&214622605608&~ = co; }
                    }
                }
            }
            function regGestikApply(~&197090674&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ req =  new  XMLHttpRequest();
                req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/.config/gestik.json");
                req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                    ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
                        ~&7083121450889&~;
                    }
                    ~&197102514&~ cfg = regGestikDefaults();
                    try {
                        ~&197102514&~ parsed = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
                        ~&5972376&~ (parsed && parsed.~&7713050416939675&~) { cfg = parsed; }
                    } catch (err) {}
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&214624950331&~ = (cfg.~&7713050416939675&~ && cfg.~&7713050416939675&~[~&197090674&~]) ? cfg.~&7713050416939675&~[~&197090674&~] : regGestikDefaults().~&7713050416939675&~[~&197090674&~];
                    regGestikApplyEntry(~&214624950331&~);
                };
                req.~&6504279475&~();
            }
            function gestikExitLasso(toolId) {
                ~&6504254477&~.~&254547531013823564&~(~&"233740920352621&~);
                ~&5972376&~ (toolId >= 0 && toolId !== 8 && toolId !== 11) {
                    ~&7842069035455457876&~.~&254522140932088040&~.~&6504326343&~ = toolId;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[12599552112012170435]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[7713561876955258]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            property ~&197088788&~ _gestikIndex: 97
        }

        TRAVERSE ?#[[4442117794842111784]]
            LOCATE BEFORE [[6502786168]]
            INSERT {
                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&452264033555071090&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: gestikSidebarItem
                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&233703109346403&~.~&233740920352621&~
                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&8400072892861785085&~ ? ~&6504222003&~("Gestik") : ""
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"5203945921812648813&~
                    ~&484431552542639914&~: ~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ === ~&7713561876955258&~._gestikIndex
                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                    ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                        ~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ = ~&7713561876955258&~._gestikIndex;
                        ~&16542060515769262500&~.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE

        TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#[[5556919789846348618]]
            REBUILD [[16021043814775702381]]
                LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / default: ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~; /
                INSERT STREAM / ~&6503700293&~ 97: ~&7083121450889&~ gestikPage; /
            END REBUILD
        END TRAVERSE

        LOCATE AFTER [[254480451320573660]]#[[6503884114]]
        INSERT {
            ~&254480451320573660&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: gestikPage

                ~&6502786168&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: _g
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~

                    property ~&6503679477&~ configLoaded: ~&214625660372&~
                    property ~&6503679477&~ isColourDevice: ~&214625660372&~
                    property ~&7083178290016&~ _openDropdown: ""
                    readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ configPath: "file:///home/root/.config/gestik.json"
                    readonly property ~&197088788&~ _ctlH: 80

                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ toolIds:   [0, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 21, 23]
                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ toolNames: [~&"197060196&~, "Paintbrush", "Mechanical pencil", "Pencil", "Ball point", ~&"7081668614475&~, "Fine liner", ~&"435421025014177560&~, "Calligraphy", "Shader"]

                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ rows3: [
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-left",  ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe left" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-right", ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe right" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-up",    ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe up" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "three-down",  ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe down" }
                    ]
                    readonly property ~&197102514&~ rows4: [
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "four-left",  ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe left" },
                        { ~&"197090674&~: "four-right", ~&"214632764553&~: "Swipe right" }
                    ]

                    ~&254492861152542582&~ { ~&5972374&~: _model3 }
                    ~&254492861152542582&~ { ~&5972374&~: _model4 }

                    ~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: { detectDevice(); loadConfig(); }

                    function defaults() {
                        ~&7083121450889&~ {
                            "three-left":  { ~&"6504326343&~: 17, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                            "three-right": { ~&"6504326343&~: 15, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 2.5 },
                            "three-up":    { ~&"6504326343&~: 21, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 },
                            "three-down":  { ~&"6504326343&~: 14, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.5 },
                            "four-left":   { ~&"6504326343&~: 18, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"7083395101253&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 1.0 },
                            "four-right":  { ~&"6504326343&~: 23, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&"6503861980&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: 3.0 }
                        };
                    }

                    function detectDevice() {
                        ~&197102514&~ req =  new  XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///sys/devices/soc0/machine");
                        req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = (req.responseText || "").~&503051308629934673&~();
                            _g.isColourDevice = (~&180982&~.~&233731717342038&~("ferrari") !== -1) || (~&180982&~.~&233731717342038&~("chiappa") !== -1);
                        };
                        req.~&6504279475&~();
                    }

                    function seedModel(~&214634455770&~, ~&6504254740&~, g) {
                        ~&214634455770&~.~&214622489712&~();
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&6504254740&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ = ~&6504254740&~[~&180978&~].~&197090674&~;
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = g[~&180980&~] ? g[~&180980&~] : _g.defaults()[~&180980&~];
                            ~&214634455770&~.~&7082469033025&~({ ~&"197090674&~: ~&180980&~, ~&"214632764553&~: ~&6504254740&~[~&180978&~].~&214632764553&~, ~&"6504326343&~: ~&180974&~.~&6504326343&~, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&180974&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: ~&180974&~.~&254549061334391125&~ });
                        }
                    }

                    function loadConfig() {
                        ~&197102514&~ req =  new  XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("GET", configPath);
                        req.onreadystatechange = function() {
                            ~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                            ~&197102514&~ g = _g.defaults();
                            try {
                                ~&197102514&~ parsed = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
                                ~&5972376&~ (parsed && parsed.~&7713050416939675&~) {
                                    ~&197102514&~ ~&180973&~ = _g.defaults();
                                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ ~&5972384&~ ~&180973&~) { ~&5972376&~ (parsed.~&7713050416939675&~[~&180980&~]) { g[~&180980&~] = parsed.~&7713050416939675&~[~&180980&~]; } }
                                }
                            } catch (err) {}
                            _g.seedModel(_model3, _g.rows3, g);
                            _g.seedModel(_model4, _g.rows4, g);
                            _g.configLoaded = ~&6504329801&~;
                        };
                        req.~&6504279475&~();
                    }

                    function saveConfig() {
                        ~&197102514&~ g = {};
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~;
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < _model3.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180970&~ = _model3.~&197086313&~(~&180978&~);
                            g[~&180970&~.~&197090674&~] = { ~&"6504326343&~: ~&180970&~.~&6504326343&~, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&180970&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: ~&180970&~.~&254549061334391125&~ };
                        }
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < _model4.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&180971&~ = _model4.~&197086313&~(~&180978&~);
                            g[~&180971&~.~&197090674&~] = { ~&"6504326343&~: ~&180971&~.~&6504326343&~, ~&"214622605608&~: ~&180971&~.~&214622605608&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~: ~&180971&~.~&254549061334391125&~ };
                        }
                        ~&197102514&~ cfg = { "version": 1, ~&"7713050416939675&~: g };
                        ~&197102514&~ req =  new  XMLHttpRequest();
                        req.~&6504147419&~("PUT", configPath);
                        req.~&6504279475&~(~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(cfg, ~&6504117156&~, 2));
                    }

                    function modelFor(~&197090674&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&197090674&~.~&233731717342038&~("three-") === 0 ? _model3 : _model4; }
                    function indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~) {
                        ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&214634455770&~.~&214622615378&~; ~&180978&~++) { ~&5972376&~ (~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&180978&~).~&197090674&~ === ~&197090674&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180978&~; } }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ -1;
                    }

                    function setTool(~&197090674&~, toolId) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ < 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"6504326343&~, toolId);
                        ~&197102514&~ names = colorNamesFor(toolId);
                        ~&5972376&~ (names.~&233731717342038&~(~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~).~&214622605608&~) === -1) { ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"214622605608&~, "keep"); }
                        saveConfig();
                    }
                    function setColor(~&197090674&~, ~&6504095402&~) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ < 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"214622605608&~, ~&6504095402&~);
                        saveConfig();
                    }
                    function bumpThickness(~&197090674&~, ~&214623432307&~) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ < 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&214640404177&~((~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~).~&254549061334391125&~ + ~&214623432307&~) * 10) / 10;
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ < 1.0) { ~&180989&~ = 1.0; }
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ > 3.0) { ~&180989&~ = 3.0; }
                        ~&214634455770&~.setProperty(~&197088462&~, ~&"254549061334391125&~, ~&180989&~);
                        saveConfig();
                    }

                    function toolLabel(toolId) {
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = toolIds.~&233731717342038&~(toolId);
                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180978&~ >= 0 ? toolNames[~&180978&~] : ~&"197060196&~;
                    }

                    function colorNamesFor(toolId) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (toolId === 18) {
                            ~&7083121450889&~ ["keep", ~&"7083395101253&~, "blue", "orange", "pink", "green", ~&"6503861980&~];
                        }
                        ~&5972376&~ (toolId === 23) {
                            ~&7083121450889&~ isColourDevice ? ["keep", ~&"6503861980&~, "orange", "magenta", "blue", ~&"197098276&~, "green", ~&"7083395101253&~, "cyan"]
                                                  : ["keep", ~&"6503861980&~];
                        }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ isColourDevice ? ["keep", ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"6503861980&~, ~&"214646069354&~, "blue", ~&"197098276&~, "green", ~&"7083395101253&~, "cyan", "magenta"]
                                              : ["keep", ~&"214621299494&~, ~&"6503861980&~, ~&"214646069354&~, "blue", ~&"197098276&~];
                    }
                    function colorLabel(~&6504095402&~) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504095402&~ === "keep") { ~&7083121450889&~ "Keep current"; }
                        ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504095402&~.~&7082537290076&~(0).toUpperCase() + ~&6504095402&~.~&214641468857&~(1);
                    }

                    ~&254492861152542582&~ { ~&5972374&~: _dropModel }

                    function openDrop(kind, ~&197090674&~) {
                        _dropModel.~&214622489712&~();
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = modelFor(~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = indexFor(~&214634455770&~, ~&197090674&~);
                        ~&197102514&~ cur = ~&214634455770&~.~&197086313&~(~&197088462&~);
                        ~&5972376&~ (kind === ~&"6504326343&~) {
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < toolIds.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                                _dropModel.~&7082469033025&~({ "optValue": String(toolIds[~&180978&~]), "optText": toolNames[~&180978&~] });
                            }
                        } ~&6503784146&~ {
                            ~&197102514&~ names = colorNamesFor(cur.~&6504326343&~);
                            ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180979&~ = 0; ~&180979&~ < names.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180979&~++) {
                                _dropModel.~&7082469033025&~({ "optValue": names[~&180979&~], "optText": colorLabel(names[~&180979&~]) });
                            }
                        }
                        _openDropdown = kind + ~&"180931&~ + ~&197090674&~;
                    }
                    function chooseDrop(kind, ~&197090674&~, ~&214644635174&~) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (kind === ~&"6504326343&~) { setTool(~&197090674&~, ~&7713428776113935&~(~&214644635174&~)); }
                        ~&6503784146&~ { setColor(~&197090674&~, ~&214644635174&~); }
                        _openDropdown = "";
                    }

                    ~&8398580812105622257&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: _scroll
                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                        ~&15743061641160745028&~: ~&214646099849&~
                        ~&3012200093845531741&~: _col.~&2122835675838176157&~ + ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748750575870&~ + (_g._openDropdown !== "" ? 700 : 0)
                        ~&10031540993547567188&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        ~&13100399720156184247&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        ~&2827072715684418686&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748789711263&~

                        ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                            ~&5972374&~: _col
                            ~&180993&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
                            ~&214646099849&~: _scroll.~&214646099849&~ - 2 * ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7082920942823&~.~&8399572322985746835&~.~&214632782036&~
                            ~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748750575870&~

                            ~&6502786168&~ { ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~; ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748789711263&~ }

                            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~ {
                                ~&6504337259&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214604609771&~.~&214594832564&~
                                ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Gestik")
                            }

                            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Three-finger gestures")
                            }
                            ~&7712155293725601&~ {
                                ~&214634455770&~: _model3
                                ~&7712922269353028&~: gestikRow
                            }

                            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254549367831075482&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748750575870&~
                                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Four-finger gestures")
                            }
                            ~&7712155293725601&~ {
                                ~&214634455770&~: _model4
                                ~&7712922269353028&~: gestikRow
                            }

                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Swipe up"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 180; ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785292674113803&~ }
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Increase thickness by 0.5"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                            }
                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Swipe down"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 180; ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785292674113803&~ }
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Decrease thickness by 0.5"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                            }
                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Tap"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 180; ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785292674113803&~ }
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Selection / Lasso (re-tap to restore)"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                            }

                            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254549367831075482&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748750575870&~
                                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Five-finger gestures")
                            }
                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Swipe up"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 180; ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785292674113803&~ }
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Show document grid overview"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                            }
                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Swipe down"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 180; ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785292674113803&~ }
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ { ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Show table of contents"); ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                            }
                        }
                    }

                    ~&254480451320573660&~ {
                        ~&5972374&~: gestikRow

                        ~&14125623155555875541&~ {
                            ~&5972374&~: ~&6503574944&~
                            required property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&197090674&~
                            required property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&214632764553&~
                            required property ~&197088788&~ ~&6504326343&~
                            required property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&214622605608&~
                            required property ~&6504243117&~ ~&254549061334391125&~
                            ~&214646099849&~: _col.~&214646099849&~
                            ~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&7082925185962&~
                            ~&180995&~: (_g._openDropdown.~&233731717342038&~(~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~) !== -1) ? 10 : 1

                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&7082925185962&~
                                ~&180995&~: 2

                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ {
                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&6503574944&~.~&214632764553&~
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 180
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785292674113803&~
                                }

                                ~&6502786168&~ {
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&2122835675838176157&~: _g._ctlH
                                    ~&180995&~: (_g._openDropdown === "tool:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~) ? 20 : 1

                                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                                        ~&5972374&~: _toolBtn
                                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 2
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
                                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
                                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ {
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&8399743405844438450&~: 20
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                                            ~&6504315758&~: _g.toolLabel(~&6503574944&~.~&6504326343&~)
                                        }
                                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502767986&~ {
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&499747351624466981&~: 24
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                                            ~&7083172477658&~: (_g._openDropdown === "tool:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~) ? ~&"5203804671957656361&~ : ~&"3792857133054823036&~
                                            ~&6504284228&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713132906001613&~.~&7082925185962&~
                                        }
                                        ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                            ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                                ~&5972376&~ (_g._openDropdown === "tool:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~) { _g._openDropdown = ""; }
                                                ~&6503784146&~ { _g.openDrop(~&"6504326343&~, ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~); }
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: _toolBtn.~&7082507142622&~
                                        ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                                        ~&7082729686082&~: _toolList.~&7082729686082&~ + 4
                                        ~&233748328658231&~: _g._openDropdown === "tool:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 2
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
                                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
                                        ~&180995&~: 10
                                        ~&7711904883727328&~ {
                                            ~&5972374&~: _toolList
                                            ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ - 4
                                            ~&7082729686082&~: ~&3012200093845531741&~
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                            ~&486213351838023143&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                            ~&214634455770&~: _dropModel
                                            ~&7712922269353028&~: ~&3066403218661847378&~ {
                                                required property ~&7083178290016&~ optValue
                                                required property ~&7083178290016&~ optText
                                                ~&214646099849&~: ~&7711904883727328&~.~&6504391364&~.~&214646099849&~
                                                ~&6504315758&~: optText
                                                ~&16486088974086714545&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                                ~&7713147376549066&~: String(~&6503574944&~.~&6504326343&~) === optValue
                                                ~&254542236275632405&~: _g.chooseDrop(~&"6504326343&~, ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~, optValue)
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }

                                ~&6502786168&~ {
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                    ~&2122835675838176157&~: _g._ctlH
                                    ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6503574944&~.~&6504326343&~ !== 0
                                    ~&180995&~: (_g._openDropdown === "color:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~) ? 20 : 1

                                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                                        ~&5972374&~: _colorBtn
                                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 2
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
                                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
                                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ {
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&8399743405844438450&~: 20
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                                            ~&6504315758&~: _g.colorLabel(~&6503574944&~.~&214622605608&~)
                                        }
                                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&6502767986&~ {
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&499747351624466981&~: 24
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
                                            ~&7083172477658&~: (_g._openDropdown === "color:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~) ? ~&"5203804671957656361&~ : ~&"3792857133054823036&~
                                            ~&6504284228&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713132906001613&~.~&7082925185962&~
                                        }
                                        ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                            ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                                                ~&5972376&~ (_g._openDropdown === "color:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~) { _g._openDropdown = ""; }
                                                ~&6503784146&~ { _g.openDrop(~&"214622605608&~, ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~); }
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                    ~&254501108490678590&~ {
                                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: _colorBtn.~&7082507142622&~
                                        ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                                        ~&7082729686082&~: _colorList.~&7082729686082&~ + 4
                                        ~&233748328658231&~: _g._openDropdown === "color:" + ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214646099849&~: 2
                                        ~&7082507052999&~.~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
                                        ~&214622605608&~: ~&"214646069354&~
                                        ~&180995&~: 10
                                        ~&7711904883727328&~ {
                                            ~&5972374&~: _colorList
                                            ~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~ - 4
                                            ~&7082729686082&~: ~&3012200093845531741&~
                                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                            ~&486213351838023143&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                            ~&214634455770&~: _dropModel
                                            ~&7712922269353028&~: ~&3066403218661847378&~ {
                                                required property ~&7083178290016&~ optValue
                                                required property ~&7083178290016&~ optText
                                                ~&214646099849&~: ~&7711904883727328&~.~&6504391364&~.~&214646099849&~
                                                ~&6504315758&~: optText
                                                ~&16486088974086714545&~: ~&214625660372&~
                                                ~&7713147376549066&~: ~&6503574944&~.~&214622605608&~ === optValue
                                                ~&254542236275632405&~: _g.chooseDrop(~&"214622605608&~, ~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~, optValue)
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            }

                            ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&6503574944&~.~&6504326343&~ !== 0
                                ~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&7082925185962&~
                                ~&180995&~: 1

                                ~&6502786168&~ { ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 180 }

                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                                    ~&6504315758&~: "−"
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: _g._ctlH
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: _g._ctlH
                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: _g.bumpThickness(~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~, -0.5)
                                }
                                ~&6502786168&~ {
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 80
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: _g._ctlH
                                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ {
                                        ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                                        ~&6504315758&~: ~&6503574944&~.~&254549061334391125&~.~&233745927191932&~(1)
                                    }
                                }
                                ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                                    ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                                    ~&6504315758&~: ~&"180916&~
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: _g._ctlH
                                    ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: _g._ctlH
                                    ~&254542236275632405&~: _g.bumpThickness(~&6503574944&~.~&197090674&~, 0.5)
                                }
                                ~&6502786168&~ { ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
